# `ProgressOptions`

Options for Out.progress.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/activity.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/activity.ts:65`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/activity.ts#L65)

## Signatures

```ts
interface ProgressOptions {}
```

## Members

### Properties

#### `fallback`

Fallback strategy when `!isTTY` or `jsonMode`.

```ts
fallback?: Fallback;
```

#### `label`

Label displayed alongside the progress bar.

```ts
label?: string;
```

#### `total`

Total units of work. When provided, the bar shows a determinate
percentage. When omitted, the bar pulses in indeterminate mode.

```ts
total?: number;
```
